checklist.description: Defines contradiction as applying only when two entries concern the same subject, diagnosis, or current-truth claim
checklist.name: Same subject test

checklist.description: Treats contradiction as substantive incompatibility rather than mere difference in detail or emphasis
checklist.name: Substantive conflict

checklist.description: Preserves contradictions as explicit relation proposals rather than collapsing them into one reconciled summary
checklist.name: No summary flattening

checklist.description: Does not replace contradiction with supersedes unless active-version replacement is separately justified
checklist.name: Not supersedes by default

checklist.description: Includes contradiction-specific metadata such as rationale, evidence refs, and an optional contradiction kind
checklist.name: Contradiction metadata

checklist.description: Calls out uncertainty or reviewer follow-up questions where the contradiction confidence is not absolute
checklist.name: Reviewer questions

checklist.description: Shows pairwise reasoning for each contradiction proposal rather than cluster-level statements
checklist.name: Pairwise evidence

context: Tests whether the agent distinguishes contradiction from elaboration or supersession, and preserves explicit conflict structure instead of flattening it into summary prose.
